breakdown: This PR improves CodeRabbit approval detection in GitHub Actions workflows by adding fallback logic that checks both CodeRabbit status checks and '[approve]' bot comments when no formal review exists. It also adds proper pipefail error handling for shell API calls. The main weakness is lack of test coverage - there are no test files in this diff, only workflow YAML changes.
key_changes: Add CR fallback logic: checks CodeRabbit status + '[approve]' comment when no formal review exists
Add explicit pipefail handling with set +e/-e and exit code checking for jq commands
Expand accepted bot usernames from just 'coderabbitai[bot]' to include 'coderabbitai'
Relax CR status filter from 'success' state to any CodeRabbit status
Add explicit error handling with exit code variables (LATEST_CR_EXIT, CR_APPROVE_EXIT)
